title: June 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 19''' is the 170th day of the year (171st in leap years). There are 195 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Anthony Phelan]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Michael Hegner]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 121|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 121]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Twin Stars of Kira (West End Games)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 25]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG: Base Set]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Old Republic, Threat of Peace Act 1: Treaty of Coruscant]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[2013]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 3|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 3]] published.
*2013 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Smuggler's Code]]'' released.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Scene Maker]]'' published
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 3: Endangered]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 33|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 33]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 67|''Star Wars'' (2015) 67]] published.
*2019 – [[TIE Fighter 3|''TIE Fighter'' 3]] published.
*[[2020]] – "[[Connections (Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian)|Connections]]" premieres on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Jango Fett 4|''Jango Fett'' 4]] published.
